reasoning: The control CM-8 (4) focuses on ensuring that system components are managed and accountable, typically through mechanisms like SSM (Systems Manager) in cloud environments. This involves inventory management and compliance patching, which are more aligned with infrastructure and instance management rather than Kubernetes-specific controls. Kubernetes does not inherently manage the underlying nodes or their patching; this is typically handled by the cloud provider or external tools. Therefore, there is no direct Kubernetes equivalent for this control.
title: System Component Inventory | Accountability Information
